message: Hi! Thanks for your interest in our Indiranagar billboard. The location gets very high footfall from IT professionals and young residents. Happy to discuss further.
Great! We are launching a premium fitness brand called FitPeak. The demographics at Indiranagar are ideal. Can we do a 3-month agreement starting June 1st?
3 months works for us. Your offered price of ₹58,000 is a bit below our listed rate. We could meet at ₹61,000/month for a 90-day term. Does that work?
We can do ₹60,000. That is our maximum for this campaign budget. Looking forward to working together!
